[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Cothron''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Nice guy the rest of the time, though."|Unknown Stormtrooper about Cothron|<ref name="X-Wing: Iron Fist" />}}
Lieutenant Cothron was stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Halmad/Legends|Halmad]] where he was captured by [[Wraith Squadron]] during their initial [[Halmad campaign|mission]] on the planet. Cothron was out drinking with other pilots at [[Rojio's]] when Wraith Squadron pilots [[Kell Tainer]] and [[Ton Phanan]] provoked a fight with their group. The bar's [[Unidentified bartender (Rojio's)|bartender]] called the planet's military police and when they finally arrived, all of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pilots—except the group's ranking officer, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Wanatte]]—were unconscious. The [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] arrested all of them and on a deserted area, shot and stunned the Imperial pilots. The stormtroopers were actually the rest of the Wraith's in disguise, led by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. The Wraiths took Cothron and the rest of the stunned pilots back to [[Victory Base]] in order to infiltrate the base and steal its [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]].

==Talents and abilities==
Even though he was a pilot and bestowed the rank of a lieutenant, Cothron was said to be really bad in [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]].
